name_en: M48865 White and Pink Enamel Chain/Small M23950 This Capucines Small bag features soft, muted tones that make the classic silhouette stand out. Exquisite chains link metal Monogram flowers, each cast, enameled, and hand-polished to shimmer with brilliant light. The flap can be worn on the outside or tucked inside to reveal the LV logo. size:27x18x9cm
